changes.text: AI Pulse tab in the dashboard showing daily top AI stories from Hacker News, each summarised by Gemini in both English and Finnish.
Interactive 1-year stock price chart for 12 AI companies (NVDA, MSFT, GOOGL, META, AMD, ARM, AVGO, CRWV, PLTR, AI, SNOW, SOUN) with a company name selector and gradient area chart.
Vercel Cron job running daily at 08:00 UTC to refresh trends and stock data automatically.
Two new Turso tables: ai_trends and ai_stocks, with Drizzle migrations and upsert-safe query functions.
Stock chart axis labels now use a hardcoded colour to stay visible on dark backgrounds.
Dashboard Changelog tab with a curated, bilingual release history and coloured type pills.
Availability and social links panel next to the Overview contact form on wide screens.
Inline GitHub and LinkedIn brand icons so the companion panel does not depend on brand icons in lucide-react.
Overview contact section now uses a two-column layout on large screens and stacks cleanly on mobile.
Dashboard view query widened so ?view=changelog is preserved on reloads and deep links.
Custom SVG favicon across all routes.
Refreshed README to match current scope, security notes and ignored files.
Share button navigator type narrowing under strict TypeScript.
Cleared out the committed .env.example to avoid stale guidance.

releases.title: Native share, privacy policy & social metadata

changes.text: Native share actions on the home page and dashboard blog.
Localised privacy policy page with a cookie inventory.
Improved social metadata previews and landing copy in both locales.
Refined Finnish metadata title wording.
Sitemap URLs now point at the production domain consistently.

releases.title: Public blog routes, cookie consent & performance

changes.text: Public localised blog routes so posts can be indexed for SEO.
Localised cookie consent module, banner and settings trigger.
Average-messages-to-unlock metric on the dashboard.
Reduced landing JS footprint and preconnected the analytics host.
Cleaned up bilingual dashboard copy and theme labels.
Robots and sitemap routes are now excluded from locale middleware.
Localised dashboard blog view with markdown rendering and pagination.
Localised technologies view grouped by category.
Expanded the early workflow section in the seeded blog posts.
Rewrote the README to match the current project scope.
Corrected the Gemini version referenced in the blog posts.
Redesigned the dashboard with a sidebar, overview and analytics cards.
Shared dashboard stats cache powering both the UI and the stats API.
Unified bilingual labels across the dashboard surface.
Prevented the landing hero from auto-scrolling on load.
Tightened dashboard stats reads and improved DB failure visibility.
Cleared all environment values from the committed .env.example.
Migrated the locale middleware to the Next 16 proxy API.
Made locale routing edge-safe to keep the middleware bundle slim.
Inlined the i18n config in the middleware for the edge runtime.
Initial bilingual Sentinel (AI Bouncer) challenge flow with trust/compromise progression.
Signed unlock cookie and protected dashboard entry.
Baseline production hardening and deployment wiring.
Cleaned up contact details in the README for the public repository.
